scene1.text: One day, a boy decided to send a simple text to a girl.

overthink.text: That message changed everything. Good thing he sent it.

scene2.text: They started talking. One conversation turned into many.

scene3.text: Days turned into weeks. Talking to her became the best part of his day.

buttons.label: Wait and see where it goes ⏳

scene4.text: After a month of talking, the boy realized something.
scene4.revealText: He had caught feelings for her.

lines:
Before I ask you something important,
there are a few terms and conditions.
Do you agree to always disturb me for no reason?
Do you agree to spam me with random texts when you're bored?
Do you agree to accept my flaws, my weird habits, and my bad jokes?
Do you agree to listen to my stupid stories again and again?
Do you agree to be the reason I smile every day?
Do you agree to let me be the reason you smile too?
Do you agree to be my girlfriend?

celebration.text: You just made me the happiest guy alive. 🥹💖
